scenarios.description: charset(html) on HTML syntax with no existing <meta charset> adds new meta[charset] and removes none
scenarios.precondition: Document in default state with OutputSettings.syntax=html, updateMetaCharset initially false
pseudocode: TEST TC01 charset html new meta

scenarios.description: charset(html) on HTML syntax with existing multiple obsolete <meta name=charset> removes all and updates existing <meta charset>
scenarios.precondition: Document.head() contains <meta charset="UTF-8"> and two <meta name=charset> elements
scenarios.expectedResult: existing meta[charset] attr "charset" updated to charset.displayName(); select("meta[name=charset]") yields empty list
pseudocode: TEST TC02 charset html update meta

scenarios.description: charset(xml) on XML syntax with first child XmlDeclaration named 'xml' with version attr updates encoding only
scenarios.path: B0→B1(updateMetaCharset)→B2(outputSettings.charset)→B3(ensureMeta)→B4(syntax==xml)→B5(ensureChildNodes)→B6(firstNode instanceof XmlDeclaration && name==xml)→B7(attr update encoding)→B8(attr version unchanged)→B9(exit
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = new Document("/"), doc.updateMetaCharsetElement(true), doc.outputSettings().syntax(Syntax.xml); prepend an XmlDeclaration("xml",false) with attr("version","1.0")
scenarios.expectedResult: first child XmlDeclaration has attr("encoding")==charset.displayName() and attr("version")=="1.0"
pseudocode: TEST TC03 charset xml update existing xml decl
XmlDeclaration decl = new XmlDeclaration("xml", false); decl.attr("version","1.0"); doc.prependChild(decl);

scenarios.description: charset(xml) on XML syntax with first child XmlDeclaration named other creates new xml decl prepended
scenarios.path: B0→B1(updateMetaCharset)→B2(outputSettings.charset)→B3(ensureMeta)→B4(syntax==xml)→B5(ensureChildNodes)→B6(firstNode instanceof XmlDeclaration && name!=xml)→B7(create new decl and prepend)→B8(exit
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = new Document("/"); doc.outputSettings().syntax(Syntax.xml); doc.updateMetaCharsetElement(true); prepend XmlDeclaration("notxml",false)
scenarios.expectedResult: childNodes.get(0) is new XmlDeclaration with name=="xml", attrs version=="1.0", encoding==charset.displayName()
pseudocode: TEST TC04 charset xml replace wrong decl
XmlDeclaration wrong = new XmlDeclaration("foo", false); doc.prependChild(wrong);

scenarios.description: charset(xml) on XML syntax with no XmlDeclaration creates new xml decl prepended
scenarios.path: B0→B1(updateMetaCharset)→B2(outputSettings.charset)→B3(ensureMeta)→B4(syntax==xml)→B5(ensureChildNodes)→B6(firstNode not XmlDeclaration)→B7(create new decl and prepend)→B8(exit
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = new Document("/"); doc.outputSettings().syntax(Syntax.xml); doc.updateMetaCharsetElement(true); ensure no XmlDeclaration in childNodes
scenarios.expectedResult: childNodes.get(0) is XmlDeclaration with name=="xml", attr("version")=="1.0" and attr("encoding")==charset.displayName()
pseudocode: TEST TC05 charset xml new decl

scenarios.description: charset(null) throws NullPointerException on null charset parameter
scenarios.expectedResult: throws NullPointerException; updateMetaCharsetElement(true) but no meta/xml changes
pseudocode: TEST TC06 charset null throws NPE
